impact: Advances the PP&D DevHub recorder plan by capturing a deterministic mocked correction-upload review state, including upload controls, accepted file hints, validation feedback, draft status, and exact confirmation gates without live DevHub automation or private artifacts.
summary: Add a redacted DevHub correction-upload review snapshot fixture with fixture-local validation.
target_task: Task checkbox-56: Add a DevHub mocked workflow snapshot fixture for correction upload review that records upload controls, accepted file hints, validation messages, draft state, and exact confirmation gates using only redacted values.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
